data.title: Farcaster will airdrop limited edition NFTs to the first 10,000 Pro subscribers next week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Dan Romero, co-founder of the social protocol Farcaster, said that Farcaster Pro will airdrop limited edition NFTs to the first 10,000 professional subscribers next week. NFTs will appear in the user's Farcaster app wallet, and users can send them to other wallets. In addition, the three professional subscription benefits expected to be launched the week of June 16 include: 10K characters of content publishing, 4 embed functions (including pictures, videos, URLs, CA, and mini apps), and a new profile banner image function. The professional subscription contract on Base is currently being finalized and will support USDC payments, allowing users to subscribe monthly or annually without permission. FIP was delayed until Monday.

data.title: Canadian Prime Minister: US tariffs on Canada are illegal and unreasonable
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Canadian Prime Minister Carney said that Canada is facing unreasonable tariffs from the United States, its largest trading partner. Carney urged the Canadian Parliament to pass the "Canadian Economic Integration Act" proposed by the government that day to speed up the approval of domestic infrastructure projects in Canada and eliminate domestic trade barriers. It is understood that the bill aims to reduce provincial trade barriers in Canada and prompt Canada to form a unified market. The bill will also speed up the approval process for major infrastructure projects, shortening the approval time from five years to two years. Carney also said on the same day that the Canadian government will continue to negotiate with the US government on trade issues and asked the United States to "cancel the illegal and unreasonable tariffs imposed on Canada as soon as possible." (Jinshi)

data.title: Coinbase CEO: Account freezing has been made a priority and has been reduced by 82%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News, Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong posted on the X platform that the Coinbase account freezing problem has been around for a long time, so long that it is unacceptable. There are many reasons for this problem, but more importantly, Coinbase has now made this problem a priority, and it is progressing smoothly. The problem has been reduced by 82%, and there will be more improvements in the future. Coinbase will keep users informed of the progress of improvement measures. If the Coinbase account is still restricted (not due to sanctions or illegal activities), please send a private message to the support account to seek a quick solution.

data.title: Polyhedra CTO: ZKML technology will play an important role in verifying AI service quality and ensuring AI Agent security
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: At the "2025 Web3 x AI Innovation Forum" jointly organized by the Tsinghua University Student Blockchain Association and Polyhedra, Hu Yuncong, assistant professor at Shanghai Jiaotong University and co-founder of Polyhedra, delivered a keynote speech entitled "Reshaping the Trust Boundary: A New Paradigm of Trusted Outsourced Computing Based on ZK"; Xie Tiancheng, Ph.D. from the University of California, Berkeley, co-founder and CTO of Polyhedra, delivered a keynote speech entitled "AI+Web3: The Prospects and Future of ZKML". Among them, Xie Tiancheng mentioned: "Verifying liquidity is incomparable to the complexity of calculation. Specifically in AI model applications, the primary value of ZKML (zero-knowledge machine learning) lies in verifying service quality. For example, in trading bots, users can verify the quality of robot operation through ZKML. Secondly, with the growth of AI Agents and the authorization of their sensitive permissions, ZKML can effectively ensure the security of AI agents, that is, users can play the role of verifiers and build a trust system between humans and AI agents. In addition, ZKML can also provide data market functions, audit training data functions, etc., which will play an important role in the subsequent on-chain AI construction."

data.title: Hong Kong Securities Regulator Issues Warning on Phishing Scams
data.description:
According to PANews, the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) has officially announced a rise in phishing scams involving impersonation of licensed corporations. Scammers have been deceiving clients into clicking hyperlinks in mobile text messages, redirecting them to websites resembling those of licensed corporations. This has allowed the scammers to capture clients' usernames, passwords, and authentication details, enabling unauthorized transactions in clients' accounts.

In response, the SFC has issued guidelines to licensed corporations to prevent unauthorized transactions in client accounts. Clients who have disclosed their login information to unverified websites or noticed unauthorized transactions in their accounts are advised to contact their licensed corporation immediately and report the incident to the police.

data.title: Korean star Jun Ji-hyun's husband Choi Joon-hyuk faces huge losses due to his investment in Wemade, a listed company involved in blockchain gaming business
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Korean media Chosun, Alpha Asset Management, headed by Choi Jun-hyuk as CEO, is facing a large book loss due to holding Wemade shares worth 35 billion won. The company purchased shares at 34,894 won and 63,887 won per share in October 2023 and January 2024, respectively. The current share price is 25,000 won, and the estimated loss is 15.8 billion won.
Recently, the virtual currency Wemix was delisted again by the Korean Exchange Alliance DAXA due to a security incident, which made Wemade's stock price rebound expectations go unfulfilled. Previously, Wemix's rise had driven Wemade's stock price up many times.
Wemade recorded an operating loss of 11.3 billion won in the first quarter, an increase year-on-year. Analysts believe that the company's weak blockchain business performance and the high marketing costs of the game "Legend of Ymir" are the main reasons.
Wemade plans to hold an emergency online briefing at 6:30 p.m. today, with Wemix Foundation representative Jin Xihuan attending to discuss communications with global exchanges and potential legal actions.
